refined_caption: There are water puddles on the hospital floor, and people are walking in the background. The puddles appear to be scattered across the floor.
complaint_description: I was visiting my family member on the general ward and noticed that there were water puddles all over the floor. This is a slipping hazard and could lead to accidents. The hospital should clean this up immediately to ensure patient safety.
voice_text: There's water all over the floor on the general ward, it's really slippery and someone's gonna get hurt.
